# CLRS Solutions

> Solutions to exercises and problems from "Introduction to Algorithms" (3rd edition) by Cormen, Leiserson, Rivest, and Stein (CLRS).

This website provides intuition-first explanations for CLRS textbook exercises and problems. Solutions prioritize building understanding over formal proofs, with concrete examples, analogies, and working code where applicable.

## Coverage

- Chapter 1: The Role of Algorithms in Computing
- Chapter 2: Getting Started
- Chapter 3: Growth of Functions
- Chapter 4: Divide-and-Conquer
- Chapter 5: Probabilistic Analysis and Randomized Algorithms
- Chapter 6: Heapsort
- Chapter 7: Quicksort
- Chapter 8: Sorting in Linear Time
- Appendix A: Summations

## URL Pattern

Solutions are at: https://atekihcan.github.io/CLRS/{chapter}/{id}/

- Exercises: E{chapter}.{section}-{number} (e.g., E05.02-04)
- Problems: P{chapter}-{number} (e.g., P05-01)

## Sitemap

Full sitemap: https://atekihcan.github.io/CLRS/sitemap.xml
